column11: 1000: Got underway. NOTE: There are very few courses or distances given. These positions are guesses and not reliable.
From 2200-2230 went 21/2 mi N. Stood for another ship. Rest obscured by spilled ink.
0300: cc NExE. Stood for it, changing course as necessary.
1300: Anchored. Brgs: Ft Fisher W; Bld Head LH SWxW.
1800: cc NNE. Buoy brg SE dist 1/2 mi. cc NE 3 mi to 1840, then SSW.
1900: Buoy brg SxW dist 11/2 mi. 1930 near buoy, cc NNE.
2000: Stood NNE 51/2 mi to 2130; S 41/2 mi to 2300; NNE 3 mi til 2400.
0000: Cruising alg coast NNE and SSW.
1800: Got Underway. cc NNE 21/2mi then SSW 11/4 mi..
0000: Standing alg coast NNE and SSW from one to five miles NNE of buoy.
0400: Cruising alg coast NNE and SSW 3 mi from the buoy.
8AM: Anchored. Brg: Ft Fisher W dist 5 mi.
1640: Got Underway. Gave chase, no directions.
2000: cc NNE. Buoy dist 1/4 mi. 2000: cc NNE 7 til 2150.
0000: Cruising up and down from 3 to 7 mi NNE of buoy. 2400: Buoy SSW dist 5 mi.
1800: cc NNE and SSW alg coast.
0030: Buoy brg SSW dist 21/2 mi. 0040 cc NNE.
1545: Got Underway. Full speed in chase. Cc S.
1700: Anchored. 1715 Got underway. Cc NNE 3 mi to 1750 then SSW.
1800: Cruising alg coast from Ft Fisher to NNE 3 mi.
2000: Cruising alg coast 2 mi inside of buoy.
0000: Cruising on station and to left of it.
0400: Cruising on station from 1/2 to 6 miles NNE of buoy.
0600: Buoy brg SW dist 1/2 mi, cc NNE.
1745: Got Underway. Stood for night station.
1800: Buoy brg SSW dist 2 mi., cc NNE 4 mi to 1850, then SSW 4 mi to 1940.
2000: Cruising up and down coast from 11/2 to 7 mi NNE of buoy.
0000: Cruising alg coast NNE and SSW.
0000: Cruising alg coast NNE and SSW from 2 to 7 mi from the buoy.
0400: Cruising alog coast NNE and SSW.
0820: cc for buoy. No time for anchoring.
Noon: Near the buoy. Flagship brg NxE1/2E dist 51/2 mi.
1800: Stood SxW 1 mi below the buoy.
0000: Cruising NNE and SSW 2 mi each way from the buoy.
0745: Anchored. Near the buoy. Flagship, USS Minnesota brg NNW dist 5 mi.
1000: Got Underway. Stood for flagship. 1055 anchored.
2240: Got Underway. cc for Beaufort, NexE.
0500: cc NexE. 0630 cc NexN stood 2 mi and anchored qt 0705.
0705: Anchored. Cape Lookout LH brg ExN1/2N dist 7 mi.
1030: Got Underway. Cc NNE for Beaufort.
Noon: Anchored. Beaufort Harbor, North Carolina.
Noon: Changed his Baro 29.29 to 30.29. Noon: Beaufort Harbor, North Carolina.
0705: Got Underway. 0715 near Outer Buoy and cc SWxW.
1500: cc SW then SSW. Steering for squadron.
1735: Got Underway. Stood S on station from one to three miles S of buoy.
0710: cc for Buoy. 0720 anchored near the buoy.
8AM: Near buoy then cc SW. Probably anchored.
1720: Got Underway. Secured light to buoy.
2000: On station 1-3 mi S of buoy.
1730: Got Underway. On station 1-3 mi S of buoy.
1700: Got Underway. Drifted to SE until dark. (1730) Then Stood to S.
2000: Drifting and cruising 1-3 mi S of buoy.
1645: Got Underway. Sent light to buoy. Drifting til 1800.
1830: Near buoy, stood S 21/2 mi and stopped.
0700: cc WxN and stood for buoy.
1100: Got Underway. Stood inshore. 1130 returned to buoy and anchored.
2000: Cruising 1 to 11/2 mi S of buoy.
1800: Stood 3 mi SSW of buoy and drifted to NE.
0000: 1-2 mi S of buoy drifting NE.
2000: Crusing and drifting 3 mi S of buoy.
2100: Went ahead SwxW. Soon went back to station.
0400: On station 11/2 to 3 mi S of buoy.
1800: cc S 2 mi, E 3/4 mi, S 1 mi til 1855.
1900: cc N 3 mi to 1945 then buoy close and cc S.
2000: cc S til 2025 then N til 2100.
2220: cc E. 2230 stopped after colliding with Shenandoah.
1735: Got Underway. Stood for night station.
2000: Cruising and drifting one to three miles S of Buoy.
0000: Cruising and drifting on night station.
1800: Cruising and drifting on night station.
0000: Crusing and drifting 1 to 21/2 mi S of buoy.
1800: cc S. Cruising and drifting on night station.
2000: Cruising and drifting on night station.
0600: cc SE for strange sail. 0620 Stood for buoy.
1800: Got underway. Cc SW for station.
2000: Buoy brg N dist 3 mi. Stopped and drifting.
1745: Placed light on buoy. Took night station.
1700: Got Underway. 1740 Put light on buoy.
1805: Took our night station, cruising and drifting.
1400: Got Underway. SexE to chase vessel.
1700: Got Underway. No time given. Cruisng on station.
0000: Cruising and drifting on night station.
0925: Stood E 21/2 mi E of buoy by 0945 and dropped target. Went N 1 mi for target practice.
1125: Stood for target then stood for buoy.
1720: Put light on buoy then cruising and drifting on station.
0000: Cruising and drifting on night station.
1800: Cruising and drifting NW of the buoy. 1800: Placed light on buoy.
0000: Cruising and drifting 2 mi WNW of buoy.
1700: Got underwau. 1750 put light on buoy.
0400: Cruising and drifting 2 mi WNW of the buoy.
1330: Got Underway. Headed for US Cambridge and Florida.
0630: Got Underway. Stood for Beaufort bar.
1000: Got Underway. Stood into harbor. 1030 anchored.
The drop in pressure seems unlikely.
The drop in pressure is suspicious.
I changed Baro 30.15 to 30.51. This log-writer seems to be dyslexic.
1600: Changed baro from 30.57 to 30.27. It looks like he read the 2 as a 5.
1500: cc SSW. 1550 Steered for the bar.
1630: Anchored. Near the buoy. Drifting for rest of watch.
2000: Changed Baro 30.52 to 30.22. It looks like he misread a 2 for a 5 again.
0000: Cruising and drifting 1-2 miles NW of buoy.
1830: Put light on buoy. Stood N dist 1 mi to 1910.
1910: cc S 2 mi to 1950. Stopped and drifted.
2000: Cruising one mi S and one mi inside of the buoy.
0400: Cruising and drifting from 1 mi S to 1 mi N of buoy.
2000: Drifting on station, 1 mi SW of buoy.
0400: Cruising and drifting near the buoy.
1800: Put light on buoy and cruising around buoy.
0000: Cruising and drifting SW of buoy.
1800: Cruising and drifting SW of buoy.
1720: Got Underway. Steamed about the buoy.
2330: Posn 11 miles from buoy, cc that direction standing back slowly.
0140: Buoy brg NW, no dist given. Drifting and cruising near station.
2000: Cruising and drifting S of buoy.
0000: Cruising and drifting in sight of the buoy and inside of it.
2250: Buoy brg ENE dist 1/2 mi. cc ESE.
2400: Stopped. Buoy brg NE dist 3/4 mi.
0400: Drifting and cruising to NE of buoy.
2000: Cruising and drifting inside of buoy.
0000: Cruising and drifting on station No 1.
1800: Sent lantern to buoy. Cruising NNE & SSW dist 3/4 mi each side of buoy.
1800: Sent light to buoy. On station outside of buoy.
2000: Cruising one mile outside of buoy.
0755: Anchored. Buoy brg W dist 1/4 mi. Brgs: Fort Fisher NWxW3/4W; wreck of Peterhof W3/4S; Bald Head LH WxS1/2S. 33.92409, -77.79692

0800: All these bearings put the buoy at 33.92,  -77.80. I have been collecting these various positions, and the average of them is around 33.93, -77.82. I will continue to use the average. This is just to show the variation in their "observed" positions.
1815: Placed light on buoy. Cruising and drifting on station.
1820: Put light on buoy then cruising one mi to east of buoy.
2000: Cruising and drifting 1 to 2 mi outside of the buoy.
0400: Cruising and drifting E of buoy.
1800: Cruising N and S one mile outside of the buoy.
0000: Cruising one mile outside of buoy.
1800: On station 2 miles outside of buoy.
The rise in pressure is suspicious. 29.89 might be more reasonable than 29.98. Left it as written.
1450: Buoy brg WxS dist 4 mi, cc NExE 1 mi to 1500.
0000: Cape Lookout Lt brg NExE1/2E dist 10 mi.
1030: Got Underway. Stood in for bar.
1700: Crossed the bar. 1730 Took departure Ft Macon brgn N dist 5 mi.
1800: Cruising and drifting on station No. 1 near buoy. No mention of anchoring upon arrival near fleet.
1400: Anchored. Buoy brg NNE dist 1/2 mi.
2000: Drifting and cruising inside of buoy.
1700: Got Underway. Drifting near buoy. 1700: On night station NE of buoy.
1720: Got Underway. Cruising and drifting near buoy.
1700: Got underway, placed light on buoy.
0400: Cruising and drifting outside of buoy.
1730: Got Underway. Cruising and drifting near buoy.
This baro looks bad. I changed 29.95 to 29.75.
0240: We went N to challenge a vessel and returned to station. No time or distance given.
1830: Placed light on buoy. Took night station.
0000: Cruising and drifting outside of buoy.
1800: Placed light on buoy. Cruising and drifting E of buoy.
0000: Cruising and drifting from 1/2 to 1 mi E of buoy.
0700: Anchored. No time given, but loading coal on Nansemond at 0800.
1800: Placed light on buoy. Cruising and drifting 1/2 mi E of it.
0700: Anchored. No time given. At anchor for the rest of the day.
1800: Placed light on buoy and drifting to E of it.
0000: Cruising from 1/2 to 1 mi E of buoy.
1800: Cruising and drifting outside of buoy.
2240: cc SW but saw nothing. Probably returned. Nothing more given.
0000: Cruising and drifting outside of buoy.
1000: cc for blockading squadron about 3 miles from shore.
1230: Off Bear Inet. Slowed and stood in to examine wreck on beach 4 mi S of Bear Inlet. Passed within 21/2 mi off shore, stood out and down the coast 3-5 miles off shore rate 83/4 kts.
1800: Stopped. Took our station near to and outside the buoy.
0000: Drifting and cruising outside of buoy.
0000: Anchored. They seem to be at anchor all day.
0520: Got Underway. Cruising outside of buoy.
1800: Got Underway. Cruised near buoy, then to E.
1330: Got Underway. Stood to Ed 3 mi. Put out target.
1600: Anchored. Picked up target and anchored near USS Cambridge (probably near buoy).
1845: Got Underway. Put light on buoy and took station.
0000: Cruising and drifting on station ouside of buoy.
0400: Drifting one mi e of buoy.
0520: cc SE then returned to station.
1030: Got Underway. Shifted anchorage, stood 1 mi to E and anchored.
2200: Cruised and drifted 6 mi E of buoy.
0400: Drifting and cruising 10 mi outside of buoy.
0600: Stood for buoy and anchored. No time given for anchoring.
1800: Got Underway. Placed light on buoy.
2000: Took station about 7 mi to E of buoy.
0500: Anchored. In 12 fathoms. No position given.
1803: Got Underway. Drifted near buoy, sent light there.
2000: Cruising on station 9 mi to E of buoy.
0000: Cruising and drifting 9 mi to E of buoy.
0730: Got Underway. cc WxN chasing ship.
1800: Got Underway. 1830 Buoy brg N dist 3/4 mi.
2000: Buoy brg W1/2N dist 6 mi. 2000: Drifting and cruising 9 mi E of buoy.
0400: Cruising and drifting about 10 mi E of buoy.
1000: Anchored. Day anchorage. (Same as buoy? The buoy is 3 mi SE of day anchorage in 1863.)
1630: Got Underway. Stood slowly to station to the E.
1800: Stood to E about 8 mi and drifted and cruised.
2330: cc SSE then stood to W.
0000: Stood to W until about 10 mi E of buoy.
0400: Cruising on station 9 mi E of buoy.
0710: Buoy brg W dist 10 mi. 0735: Standing for buoy at rate 63/4 kts.
1805: Got Underway. Drifterd near buoy then took station to S.
2000: Cruising and drifting on station 3 to 5 mi SSW of buoy.
2330: Bald Head LH brg W; Buoy brg NNE, stood E until buoy brg N1/4W.
0000: Cruising on station 3 to 5 mi S of buoy.
1800: Put light on buoy. 1820 Stood to S.
2000: Stood SSE 5 mi from buoy and drifted.
0000: Drifting and cruising on station abt 7 mi SE of buoy.
0700: Anchored 0730: Got Underway. Stood WNW to buoy.
I changed Baro 30.20 to 30.50. It looks like the log-writer misread the 5 as a 2.
2000: Cruising and drifting to E of buoy.
0000: Cruising and drifting outside of buoy.
1900: Put light on buoy. 1920 stood E from buoy speed 6 kts.
0000: Cruising and drifting 6 to 8 mi E of buoy. 2400: Cruising and drifting 6 mi outside of buoy.
1900: Got Underway. Put light on buoy. Took night station  mi E of buoy.
2100: cc to E of buoy in 9 fathoms of water and drifted.
0000: Cruising and drifting in sight of buoy.
0400: Cruising and drifting 2 mi E of buoy.
1900: Sent light to buoy then stood to E.
2000: Cruising and drifting on station 7 mi E of buoy in 11/2 to 12 fathoms.
0000: Cruising and drifting 7 mi E of buoy.
0930: Got Underway. Stood 3 mi to the E. Dropped target. Fired two shots from each gun. Picked up target and returned to the fleet.
1830: Got Underway. Put light on buoy and took station 6 mi E of buoy.
2000: Cruising and drifting 6 mi E of buoy.
2000: Cruising and drifting 6 mi E of buoy.
0000: Cruising and drifting 6 mi E of buoy.
1820: Got Underway. Put light on buoy.
2000: On station 6 mi E of buoy.
0000: Cruising and drifting 8 nmi E of buoy.
1800: Brgs: Bald Head LH SWxW1/2W; The Mound W; Fort Fisher WxN1/2N. 33.9492 -77.8283
Note: The bearings between The Mound and Fort Fisher are not consistent with Bald Head.
Using just Fort Fisher and Bald Head bearings.
8AM: Anchored. Brgs: Ft Fisher W3/4S dist 5 mi. 33.9842,  -77.8197
This position is inconsistent with the bearings at 1800 previously. I'm ignoring them.
The 1800 position is 4.6 miles from Fort Fisher, but the dirction is WNW1/2W not W3/4S.
It is close, though, to W3/4N dist 5 mi.
1845: Got Underway. Took station 5 mi E of buoy.
2110: cc W to challenge then returned to 6 mi E of buoy.
0000: Stood S. On station 7 mi E of buoy.
1830: Got Underway. Stood for station 6 mi E of buoy.
1910: cc for station NNE of buoy. 1940 stopped 3 mi from buoy.
2000: Cruising on station 1 to 5 mi NE of buoy.
0000: Cruising and drifting 1 to 5 mi NE of buoy.
0700: Anchored. Buoy brg SWxS dist 1/2 mi.
1930: cc for station 1 to 3 mi NE of buoy.
2000: On station 11/2 mi NE of buoy.
0000: Cruising on night station about 2 mi to NE of buoy.
0530: Stood to N to identify vessels. Then stood for fleet.
1800: Got Underway. Took station NE of buoy.
0520: cc to buoy. 0545 anchored near buoy.
1900: Buoy brg SW dist 1/2 mi. cc NE1/2E for Beaufort.
0200: Stopped. Sounded. No word for how long.
0300: Cape Lookout Lt brg NExE1/2EW. Stopped and sounded.
8AM: Got Underway 0845: Fort Macon brg NNW dist 3 mi.
1530: Pilot on board, running into Hampton Roads.
1850: Anchored. In mouth of James River.
1700: Got Underway. Stood up the channel for Norfolk.
1730: Discharged pilot for Hampton Roads, picked up pilot for Baltimore. Standing up the bay.
0000: Steaming up Chesapeake Bay. 2400: Passed Smiths Point LS.
0900: Got Underway. Standing down the river.
0615: Got Underway. Steamed down the bay.
1540: Got Underway. Stood for Craney Id.
0530: Got Underway. Stood down the river.
Noon: This baro written as 29.20 was entered as 30.20. Noon: Hampton Roads.
1600: This pressure of 29.90 is bad. Deleted it.
0100: Ignoring his Baro values of 30 for 0100 to 0400 inclusive.
Noon: Changed Baro 30.70 to 30.07. Noon: Hampton Roads.
1600: I changed Baro 30.46 to 30.64. Our dyslexic log writer.
0400: I changed the Baro 29.30 to 29.80. I suspect he read the 8 as a 3.
1600: Changed Baros from 1600-1900 from 20.66 and 20.50 to 30.66 and 30.50. The first one might be  better as 30.56.
0745: Got Underway. Steamed down the bay.
1030: Cape Henry Lt brg WNW dist 3 mi.
2300: Cape Hatteras Lt brg NWxW dist 25 mi.
Noon: Lat and Long both DR.
I ignored their logged Lat/Long. It doesn't fit with the 1800 bearings, and those get him around the shoals better.
1800: Hove To. Brgs: Bald Head Lt brg ENE dist 8 mi.
1530: The Mound Battery brg WxN dist 10 mi.
1700: S end Smiths Id brg WNW dist 18 mi.
0530: Cape Lookout Lt brg NNW dist 18 mi.
2000: Cape Lookout Lt brg NNW. Ship in 11 fathoms water.
2345: Anchored. Cape Lookout Lt brg NxE dist 8 mi.
The bearings make no sense with the position the next day. Cape brg ExN 8 miles does, used them.
1720: Got Underway. cc for Outer Buoy. 1745 Anchored. Cape Lookout Lt brg ExS.
1345: Got Underway. Stood over the bar.
This baro reading looks very much out of place compared with the one following.
No idea what's going on here.
2000: I changed Baro 30.23 to 30.32. I suspect our dyslexic crewman.
Noon: Both Lat and Long DR. They don't fit with the bearing at 1315.
1315: Bald Head Lt brg W1/2S dist 10 mi.
1615: Anchored. With fleet. No bearings given.
1230: Drifted one mile to the E.
1400: Got Underway. Steamed for fleet. 1435: Anchored. Near fleet.
Noon: Fleet buoy off Wilmington, North Carolina.
0610: Got Underway. No info about where or how far.
1030: Got Underway. Steamed in towards the fort.
1325: Anchored. He's vague. I put him 2 miles off the fort. They can't get too close, even here they're in range of the guns.
1520: Got Underway. Resumed our position. 1550 Anchored.
0930: Got Underway. Steamed in towards the Fort.
1735: Anchored. In 53/4 fathoms near USS Wabush. No idea where Wabush is. They're firing at the fort, so leaving him where he is.
1440: Got Underway. Proceeded about two  miles off shore. 1445 Anchored.
1130: Anchored. Brgs: Fort Fisher brg WxN dist 6 mi; Bald Head Lt brg SWxW.
His bearing and distance just off Fort Fisher does not fit with bearings from Fort Fisher and Bald Head Lt
Using just the bearing and distance from Fort Fisher. This puts Bald Head Lt brg SWxW3/4W.
